languages.text: {n}Старейшина недоуменно склоняет голову.{/n} "Бичи Божьи, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Кошмары и Мороки, что спустились на мир после ухода Ноллы. Они убивали нас, и сажали на цепи, как скот, и утаскивали во тьму... Кого забрать не желали — на потеху запытывали до полусмерти, оживляли и снова пытали. М-моя мать..." {n}Голос мальчика срывается, и из-под маски доносится приглушенный вздох.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Старейшина недоуменно склоняет голову.{/n} "Бичи Божьи, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Кошмары и Мороки, что спустились на мир после ухода Ноллы. Они убивали нас, и сажали на цепи, как скот, и утаскивали во тьму... Кого забрать не желали — на потеху запытывали до полусмерти, оживляли и снова пытали. М-моя мать..." {n}Голос мальчика срывается, и из-под маски доносится приглушенный вздох.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: {n}Старейшина недоуменно склоняет голову.{/n} "Бичи Божьи, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Кошмары и Мороки, что спустились на мир после ухода Ноллы. Они убивали нас, и сажали на цепи, как скот, и утаскивали во тьму... Кого забрать не желали — на потеху запытывали до полусмерти, оживляли и снова пытали. М-моя мать..." {n}Голос мальчика срывается, и из-под маски доносится приглушенный вздох.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Älteste senkt verwirrt den Kopf.{/n} "Göttliche Geißeln, o himmlischer Gesandter. Die Albträume und Visionen, die über die Welt hereinbrachen, nachdem Nolla uns verlassen hatte. Sie töteten uns, ketteten uns an wie Vieh und schleppten uns in die Dunkelheit... Diejenigen, die sie nicht mitgenommen haben, haben sie gefoltert, wiederbelebt und erneut gefoltert. M-meine Mutter..." {n}Die Stimme des Jungen bricht, und hinter der Maske hört man einen erschütternden Seufzer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vieillard baisse la tête, confus.{/n} "Les fléaux divins, ô Envoyé céleste. Les cauchemars et les visions qui se sont abattus sur le monde après que Nolla nous a abandonnés. Ils nous ont tués, enchaînés comme du bétail et entraînés dans les ténèbres... Ceux qu'ils n'ont pas pris, ils les ont torturés, ranimés et torturés à nouveau. Ma mère..." {n}La voix du garçon se brise, et vous entendez un soupir frémissant derrière le masque.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}长老疑惑地低下了头。{/n}"天灾，天使啊。在诺拉抛弃我们之后，噩梦和幻象降临了这个世界。他们杀了我们，把我们像牲口一样锁起来，把我们拖入黑暗......没有被带走的人，他们折磨，复活，再折磨我妈妈......"{n}男孩的声音断断续续，你听到面具后传来一声颤抖的叹息。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El anciano baja la cabeza confundido.{/n} "Azotes Divinos, oh Enviado Celestial. Las pesadillas y visiones que descendieron sobre el mundo después de que Nolla nos abandonara. Nos mataron, nos encadenaron como ganado y nos arrastraron a la oscuridad... A los que no se llevaron, los torturaron, revivieron y volvieron a torturar. M-mi madre..." {n}La voz del niño se quiebra y se oye un suspiro estremecedor detrás de la máscara.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}長老は困惑して頭を下げた。{/n}「天の使者よ。ノーラが我々を見捨てた後、世界に降り注いだ悪夢と幻影。彼らは私たちを殺し、家畜のように鎖でつなぎ、暗闇に引きずり込んだ...。連れ去られなかった者は拷問され、蘇生してはまた拷問された。母さんが...」。{n}少年の声が途切れ、マスクの奥から身震いするようなため息が聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı adam şaşkınlıkla başını öne eğdi.{/n} "İlahi Belalar, ey Cennet Elçisi. Nolla bizi terk ettikten sonra dünyanın üzerine çöken kâbuslar ve görüntüler. Bizi öldürdüler, sığır gibi zincirlediler ve karanlığa sürüklediler... Almadıklarına işkence ettiler, dirilttiler ve tekrar işkence ettiler. Annem..." {n}Çocuğun sesi kesiliyor ve maskenin arkasından titreyen bir iç çekiş duyuluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elder lowers his head in confusion.{/n} "Divine Scourges, o Heavenly Envoy. The nightmares and visions that descended upon the world after Nolla abandoned us. They killed us, and chained us like cattle, and dragged us into darkness... The ones they did not take, they tortured, revived and tortured again. M-my mother..." {n}The boy's voice breaks, and you hear a shuddering sigh from behind the mask.{/n}
